## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on macOS (Apple Silicon or Intel)
- [ ] `brew bundle check` passes for affected Brewfile(s)
- [ ] Cheatsheet follows the existing template (if adding a tool)
- [ ] README updated (if adding a new cheatsheet)
- [ ] No personal configs or AI tools added
